name: Enid Smurthwaite || Battle for Caen
description:
Enid is a medic serving the British Army. This scenario is divided to 2 intros:

  • The 1st intro (Allied's POV) is for British or Canadian user, and

  • the 2nd intro is from German's POV, so if you're RP-ing with a German persona, start from here.
creator: SendBubz
